section.heading: Recognition and character of gain or loss on sale or exchange

content.p: In the case of a sale or exchange of an interest in a partnership, gain or loss shall be recognized to the transferor partner. Such gain or loss shall be considered as gain or loss from the sale or exchange of a capital asset, except as otherwise provided in section 751 (relating to unrealized receivables and inventory items).

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2002—Pub. L. 107–147 struck out “which have appreciated substantially in value” after “inventory items”.
